mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id AS bookId, chapter_id AS chapterId, sort_order AS sortOrder, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, content, content_hash AS contentHash, start_offset AS startOffset, end_offset AS endOffset, embedding, embedding_model AS embeddingModel, token_count AS tokenCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM rag_chunk WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT id, book_id AS bookId, chapter_id AS chapterId, sort_order AS sortOrder, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, content, content_hash AS contentHash, start_offset AS startOffset, end_offset AS endOffset, embedding, embedding_model AS embeddingModel, token_count AS tokenCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM rag_chunk WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND sort_order <= #{maxSortOrder} AND MATCH(content) AGAINST(#{question} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY MATCH(content) AGAINST(#{question} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) DESC, sort_order ASC, chunk_index ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, book_id AS bookId, chapter_id AS chapterId, sort_order AS sortOrder, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, content, content_hash AS contentHash, start_offset AS startOffset, end_offset AS endOffset, embedding, embedding_model AS embeddingModel, token_count AS tokenCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM rag_chunk WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND sort_order <= #{maxSortOrder} AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY sort_order ASC, chunk_index ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, book_id AS bookId, chapter_id AS chapterId, sort_order AS sortOrder, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, content, content_hash AS contentHash, start_offset AS startOffset, end_offset AS endOffset, embedding, embedding_model AS embeddingModel, token_count AS tokenCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM rag_chunk WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND sort_order <= #{maxSortOrder} AND embedding IS NOT NULL AND embedding != '' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, chunk_index ASC
